document_id: How to Review Submissions using the eNC3 Portal

findings.description: Annotated images are incorrectly processed. The graphics are severely cropped, losing visual context (e.g., pointing arrows), and the text annotations have been extracted and placed as plain body text out of context.
findings.evidence: On the first image, top and bottom annotations are cropped out and appear as a list of text below the image. On the second image, annotations on the right are cropped, and that text incorrectly appears at the very top of the subsequent page (HTML page 3).

findings.description: A single screenshot image is improperly split into two separate image elements across the HTML rendering flow.
findings.evidence: The large image under 'Step 2' showing the Submission Review screen is cut horizontally after the 'Tax Year' line. The remainder of the image (Uploaded Files, Packages, Submit button) is orphaned at the top of HTML page 4.

findings.description: An image displaying submission confirmation details is improperly split across the HTML rendering flow.
findings.evidence: The image under 'Step 1' is cut horizontally right beneath the 'Print Submission Confirmation' link. The rest of the image containing the tabular data is pushed to the top of HTML page 5.
